title: Buttery Gooey Australian Chicken Liver Stir-fry
description: An energizing dish featuring chicken liver, cooked with a tadka (a mix of spices) for a buttery and gooey texture, perfect as a breakfast option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chicken liver
ingredients.notes: ensure it's fresh and properly thawed

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons butter
ingredients.notes: use for both cooking and making the tadka

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon mustard seeds (kala namak)
ingredients.notes: for the tadka, optional but recommended for an authentic taste

ingredients.name: 4 green chilies (optional)
ingredients.notes: ensure they are fresh and soft

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: adjust based on preference and saltiness of chicken liver

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add mustard seeds if using and green chilies, sauté for about 30 seconds until they start to pop and smell fragrant.
Gently add the chicken liver into the pan, spreading them out evenly. Cook for about 1-2 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through.
Toss in curry leaves, lemon juice, and salt if needed. Stir-fry briefly to coat the chicken liver with the tadka mixture.
Stir in spinach or other greens (if using) and toss quickly to wilt them slightly. Cook for about 1-2 minutes more until heated through.
